description:
Git version control for non-technical office users — working copies and save versions instead of branches and commits.

Keeply translates Git concepts into everyday office language. Create working copies without branching anxiety, save versions without commit syntax, and sync via NAS or GitHub. Built with Tauri 2 + Rust + React for Windows and macOS, targeting accountants, designers, and administrative staff who want file version safety without learning Git.
v1.0.2 — Startup reliability fixes: splash screen no longer freezes on slow boot (10s watchdog), main window always becomes visible on launch, and splash handoff is now inline to avoid hidden window deadlocks.
